Hero.subtitle: We build intelligent systems that transform how businesses operate. From custom AI solutions to full-stack web development — technology that actually works.

Services.title: End-to-end technology solutions designed to give your business a competitive edge.

aiConsulting.title: AI Consulting & Strategy
aiConsulting.description: Strategic guidance to identify high-impact AI opportunities, build roadmaps, and align technology with your business goals.

customAI.title: Custom AI Solutions
customAI.description: Purpose-built AI systems — from chatbots and recommendation engines to computer vision and NLP pipelines.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.description: Streamline operations with intelligent automation that reduces costs, eliminates errors, and frees your team for higher-value work.

analytics.title: Data Analytics & BI
analytics.description: Turn raw data into actionable insights with custom dashboards, predictive models, and data infrastructure.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Modern, performant web applications built with cutting-edge technologies. From landing pages to complex platforms.

uiux.title: UI/UX Consulting
uiux.description: User-centered design that converts. We craft intuitive interfaces backed by research, testing, and iterative refinement.

About.titleTrail: No buzzwords, no over-engineering. Just solutions that deliver measurable results.
About.diff1Desc: Every project starts with your business objectives. We measure success by impact, not lines of code.
About.diff2Desc: From AI research to production deployment, our team covers the entire technology spectrum.
About.diff3Desc: Clear communication, realistic timelines, and no surprises. You always know where your project stands.

case1.title: AI Knowledge Assistant for Legal Firm
case1.description: Built a RAG-powered assistant that indexes thousands of legal documents, enabling lawyers to find precedents and draft briefs 5× faster than manual research.

case2.title: Automated Invoicing & Compliance Pipeline
case2.description: End-to-end automation: receipt capture, tax validation, ERP sync, and regulatory reporting — cutting monthly close from 5 days to 8 hours.

case3.title: Client Portal & Quoting Platform
case3.description: Full-stack web application with bilingual support, PDF generation, and an admin panel — from first commit to production in under two weeks.

q1.quote: PRAGMA transformed our customer support with AI. The chatbot handles 80% of inquiries and our team can focus on complex cases.
q1.name: Maria Gonzalez

q2.quote: Their pragmatic approach saved us months. No unnecessary complexity, just solutions that work and deliver real ROI.
q2.name: Carlos Rivera

q3.quote: The web platform PRAGMA built for us is fast, beautiful, and exactly what our users needed. Highly recommended.
q3.name: Ana Torres
